en: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When any man has a discharge from his body, his discharge is unclean.
zh: “你們要告訴以色列人，對他們說：如果男子的下體有異常排泄，他的排泄物是不潔淨的，

en: And this is the law of his uncleanness for a discharge: whether his body runs with his discharge, or his body is blocked up by his discharge, it is his uncleanness.
zh: 這異常排泄就使他不潔淨；無論下體仍有排泄流出，或是下體的排泄已經止住了，他都是不潔淨的。

en: Every bed on which the one with the discharge lies shall be unclean, and everything on which he sits shall be unclean.
zh: 有異常排泄的人睡過的床，都是不潔淨的；他坐過的家具，都必不潔淨。

en: And anyone who touches his bed shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 誰觸摸他的床，都要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: And whoever sits on anything on which the one with the discharge has sat shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 誰坐了有異常排泄的人所坐過的家具，要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: And whoever touches the body of the one with the discharge shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 觸摸了有異常排泄的人的身體，就要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: And if the one with the discharge spits on someone who is clean, then he shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 有異常排泄症的人，若是吐唾沫在潔淨的人身上，那人就要潔淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: And any saddle on which the one with the discharge rides shall be unclean.
zh: 有異常排泄的人坐過的鞍，都不潔淨。

en: And whoever touches anything that was under him shall be unclean until the evening. And whoever carries such things shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 誰觸摸他身下任何東西，都不潔淨到晚上；拿了這些東西的，要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: Anyone whom the one with the discharge touches without having rinsed his hands in water shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 誰觸摸有異常排泄的人，而沒有洗手，就要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: And an earthenware vessel that the one with the discharge touches shall be broken, and every vessel of wood shall be rinsed in water.
zh: 有異常排泄的人摸過的瓦器，必須打碎；他摸過的任何木器，都要用水洗淨。

en: "And when the one with a discharge is cleansed of his discharge, then he shall count for himself seven days for his cleansing, and wash his clothes. And he shall bathe his body in fresh water and shall be clean.
zh: “有異常排泄的人痊愈的時候，就要為自己得潔淨計算七天，洗淨自己的衣服，用活水洗身，就潔淨了。

en: And on the eighth day he shall take two turtledoves or two pigeons and come before the LORD to the entrance of the tent of meeting and give them to the priest.
zh: 第八天，他要帶兩隻斑鳩或是兩隻雛鴿，來到耶和華面前，在會幕門口交給祭司。

en: And the priest shall use them, one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering. And the priest shall make atonement for him before the LORD for his discharge.
zh: 祭司要把牠們獻上，一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭；祭司因那人的異常排泄，要在耶和華面前為他贖罪。

en: "If a man has an emission of semen, he shall bathe his whole body in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: “人若是遺精，就要用水把全身洗淨，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: And every garment and every skin on which the semen comes shall be washed with water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 無論是衣服或是皮革，被精液染污，都要用水洗淨，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: If a man lies with a woman and has an emission of semen, both of them shall bathe themselves in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 至於女人，男人若是與她同睡性交，兩人都要用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: "When a woman has a discharge, and the discharge in her body is blood, she shall be in her menstrual impurity for seven days, and whoever touches her shall be unclean until the evening.
zh: “如果女人身上排泄的是經血，她必污穢七天；摸她的，都不潔淨到晚上。

en: And everything on which she lies during her menstrual impurity shall be unclean. Everything also on which she sits shall be unclean.
zh: 在她污穢的時期，她躺過的東西，都不潔淨；她坐過的東西，也都不潔淨。

en: And whoever touches her bed shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 觸摸她的床的，都要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: And whoever touches anything on which she sits shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 觸摸她坐過的任何家具，都要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: Whether it is the bed or anything on which she sits, when he touches it he shall be unclean until the evening.
zh: 在女人的床上，或是在她坐過的家具上，如果有別的東西，人摸了它，就不潔淨到晚上。

en: And if any man lies with her and her menstrual impurity comes upon him, he shall be unclean seven days, and every bed on which he lies shall be unclean.
zh: 男人若是與那女人同睡，染上她的污穢，就不潔淨七天；他躺過的床都不潔淨。

en: "If a woman has a discharge of blood for many days, not at the time of her menstrual impurity, or if she has a discharge beyond the time of her impurity, all the days of the discharge she shall continue in uncleanness. As in the days of her impurity, she shall be unclean.
zh: “女人若是在月經污穢期以外，血漏多日；或是月經污穢期過長，患有血漏症；她在這些血漏的日子是不潔淨的，好像她在月經污穢的日子不潔淨一樣。

en: Every bed on which she lies, all the days of her discharge, shall be to her as the bed of her impurity. And everything on which she sits shall be unclean, as in the uncleanness of her menstrual impurity.
zh: 她在血漏症的日子躺過的床，都像她在月經污穢時的床一樣；她所坐過的家具，都不潔淨，像月經污穢的時候一樣。

en: And whoever touches these things shall be unclean, and shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
zh: 觸摸這些東西的，都不潔淨；要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

en: But if she is cleansed of her discharge, she shall count for herself seven days, and after that she shall be clean.
zh: 女人的血漏若是潔淨了，她要計算七天，然後就潔淨了。

en: And on the eighth day she shall take two turtledoves or two pigeons and bring them to the priest, to the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 第八天，她要拿兩隻斑鳩或兩隻雛鴿，帶到會幕門口，交給祭司。

en: And the priest shall use one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering. And the priest shall make atonement for her before the LORD for her unclean discharge.
zh: 祭司要獻一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭；祭司要在耶和華面前，因那婦人血漏的不潔，為她贖罪。

en: "Thus you shall keep the people of Israel separate from their uncleanness, lest they die in their uncleanness by defiling my tabernacle that is in their midst."
zh: “你們要這樣叫以色列人遠離他們的不潔，免得他們玷污我在他們中間的會幕，他們就因自己的不潔而死亡。”

en: This is the law for him who has a discharge and for him who has an emission of semen, becoming unclean thereby;
zh: 以上是關於因為異常排泄和遺精，成為不潔淨，

en: also for her who is unwell with her menstrual impurity, that is, for anyone, male or female, who has a discharge, and for the man who lies with a woman who is unclean.
zh: 以及患病污穢的婦女和患血漏的男女，還有男人與不潔淨的女人同睡的律例。
